published_title: 19: Greg Hill has that there were about 250 frame companies when he quit - "you're not making money"
archival_display_title: Greg Hill on Frame-Market Saturation and GHP Economics
summary: Greg Hill recalls approximately 250 different frames on the market when GHP stopped and says GHP sold nearly 1,000 frames annually without making meaningful money from those sales.
claim_status: attributed approximate business recollection; no audited records supplied
notes: Published title says approximately 250 frame companies; transcript says approximately 250 different frames. The transcript-based distinction is preserved.
